metadata.title: Human Resources | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered HR management platform for all your people operations — from recruitment and onboarding to attendance, performance appraisals, payroll, and employee self-service.

hero.title: Human Resources
hero.description: Streamline hiring, onboarding, attendance, performance, payroll, and employee self-service in one AI-powered people platform.

allInOneSection.title: All of your people.
allInOneSection.subtitle: All in one place.
allInOneSection.description: Get a detailed view of every department and employee. Sort by role, team, skill, manager, contract status, and attendance details.

privacySection.title: Keep the
privacySection.description: Restricted access settings protect employee contracts, wages, private information, emergency contacts, visa information, and sensitive HR records.

demo.name: Audrey Peterson
demo.footer: Only authorized users can view this profile.

skillsSection.title: Show off
skillsSection.description: Record every employee's skill set so the next time you need a French-speaking JavaScript expert, you know exactly who to call.

timeOffSection.title: Take control of
timeOffSection.description: Stay on top of PTO requests with integrated time off tracking. Use absence reports to monitor attendance and quickly approve vacation requests.

documentsSection.title: Never lose track of another document
documentsSection.description: Upload every contract, request signature, then store them all in one secure location.

features.title: Performance appraisals
features.description: Schedule employee appraisals and measure skills development.

features.title: Onboarding plans
features.description: Assign activities for newly hired employees and track their progress.

features.title: Org chart
features.description: Set teams and view company hierarchy on every employee profile.

features.title: Attendance monitoring
features.description: Track attendance, check-ins, working hours, and time management.

features.title: Recruitment management
features.description: Create job openings and manage applications from one place.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon
